content:
1. Validates/prices/persists order (with per-item discounts), decrements stock, sends confirmation email. Exists as the core end-to-end order handler.

2. No transaction wraps DB+email (email failure leaves order+stock changed); stock races possible; discount silently skipped if missing/expired; SMTP creds/config errors crash after DB writes.

3. Discount expiry comparison (strict `>`, no tz); whether discounts apply before/after tax; several config defaults.

4. SMTP transient failures, duplicate SKUs, concurrent stock, missing customer email, rounding edge cases, malformed order_data beyond basic checks.
